title: Evangelion as an EXTREEEEEME early 90s toyline
display_title: Evangelion as an EXTREEEEEME early 90s toyline
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion as an EXTREEEEEME early 90s toyline             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Tue Nov 08, 2016 8:07 am Remember how Alien, Terminator and other such films inexplicably got kid-oriented toylines in the 90s? Well, what if Evangelion got the same treatment? Post your ideas for a theoretical 90s Kenner/Mattel or whatever Eva toyline, with all the crazy colours, stupid action features, completely non-canon weapons and dripping goo that comes with them! Here's my contribution to start us off. Squigger's Figures Emporium EXTREEEEEEME Evangelion series  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Evangelion as an EXTREEEEEME early 90s toyline             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 08, 2016 8:35 am Squigsquasher wrote: Remember how Alien ... inexplicably got kid-oriented toylines in the 90s?

[]: Re: Evangelion as an EXTREEEEEME early 90s toyline             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Sat Nov 12, 2016 9:05 am The Eva Monkey wrote: YAAASSSSSSSS! SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Evangelion as an EXTREEEEEME early 90s toyline             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sat Nov 12, 2016 9:29 am I played with that alien queen figure so much her torso fell off.

[]: Re: Evangelion as an EXTREEEEEME early 90s toyline             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sat Nov 12, 2016 6:41 pm There's only one possible answer. If it's the early 90s, we have to have Evas that transform into dinosaurs!

[]: Re: Evangelion as an EXTREEEEEME early 90s toyline             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sat Nov 12, 2016 6:51 pm Oh my god somebody write that right now.

[]: Re: Evangelion as an EXTREEEEEME early 90s toyline             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Nov 12, 2016 10:29 pm ...and they can fuse into the super mega evazord.

[]: Re: Evangelion as an EXTREEEEEME early 90s toyline             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sat Nov 12, 2016 10:35 pm Are you visualizing a horrifying mass of dinosaur and mammal flesh fused into a lumbering mass of suspiciously genitallic orifices and appendages wailing in pain as it defeats the monster of the week? Because I am.

[]: Re: Evangelion as an EXTREEEEEME early 90s toyline             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Thu Nov 24, 2016 6:00 am NemZ wrote: ...and they can fuse into the super mega evazord.

[]: Re: Evangelion as an EXTREEEEEME early 90s toyline             Quote Post by Charizard » Sun Nov 27, 2016 2:50 pm Squigsquasher wrote: "We need Evazord power, now!" "Just hold on a minute, stupid Shinji! If you think I'm fusing my beautiful T-rex 02 with your stupid Triceratops 01 and Wondergirl's lumpy Brachiosaurus 00 then you've got another thing coming!" "The prospect of becoming one with Shinji's horny dinosaur...it makes me feel warm." ...And this is why I shouldn't post whilst I'm bored at college.
